rationale: Educ. Code §34.011 governs appeals of school transportation policy decisions and is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A policy decision of a board of county school trustees or board of trustees of a school district affecting transportation is final and may not be appealed.
_note: Rule text concerns school transportation appeals; no nexus to homestead exemption valuation.
